title: VistaJet
summary: We wowed a private jet powerhouse with a next level experience
overview: In order to attack the private airline sector, we created a homepage concept for VistaJet. We conducted a complete audit of their current website and found places for improvement. We attached the flight search to the nav, we created an animated header, added simple animations on scroll, and showcased their fleet in a more memorable way than their current site. I believe this site would blow the competition out of the water while still being accessible and easy to use.
